title: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction
display_title: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction
wikitext:
[]: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Apr 30, 2016 4:15 pm http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2 ... or-auction Ladies and gentlemen of planet earth. You can't make this crap up!

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 30, 2016 11:06 pm Every time someone uses that toilet there's a new Impact.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun May 01, 2016 7:51 am I'm disappointed that it's not the MP Eva head toilet.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun May 01, 2016 6:23 pm What's next, his sock? Also, Anno and Cutie Honey in the same paragraph made my skin crawl.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by BC Baron » Sun May 01, 2016 6:32 pm Wow, the Rebuild-based punchlines just write themselves.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon May 02, 2016 11:48 pm xPearse wrote: What's next, his sock? Also, Anno and Cutie Honey in the same paragraph made my skin crawl.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by BC Baron » Tue May 03, 2016 1:29 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: If I were trapped alone on an island with only one Anno film to watch...

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed May 04, 2016 12:49 pm ^ I clever as that would be, I am: A. ...not that clever, and B. ...not wanting to subject myself to such horribleness in an already horrid situation.

[]: Re: Toilet Signed By Anno Up For Auction             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri May 06, 2016 4:52 pm The auction ended yesterday. And no one bid on it. Here's an English version of the YJA listing. http://yahoo.aleado.com/lot?auctionID=j391156586
